seo.title: Happy Horse Video AI | Try Happy Horse Online | LazyKiwi
seo.description: Happy Horse by Alibaba generates high-quality videos from text and images. Create realistic animations, dynamic scenes, and professional video content in minutes.

hero.headline: Generate **High-Quality Videos** from Text and Images
hero.tagline: Alibaba's multimodal AI model for text-to-video and image-to-video generation
hero.description: Happy Horse transforms text prompts and images into coherent video sequences. The model handles diverse visual concepts, maintains temporal consistency across frames, and supports controllable video generation. Input your description or reference image, configure parameters like duration and style, and generate videos suitable for content creation, prototyping, and creative workflows.
hero.name: Happy Horse

steps.title: Three steps from idea to video
steps.description: Transform your creative vision into professional video content with Happy Horse's intuitive workflow and powerful generation capabilities.

items.title: Select model and input prompt
items.description: Choose Happy Horse from the model library and enter your text prompt describing the video scene, action, or concept you want to create.
items.image_prompt: Clean web interface showing Happy Horse model card selected in a sidebar, with a large text input field containing a sample prompt like 'a galloping horse through misty mountains at sunrise'. Modern UI with purple accent colors, clear typography, and a 'Next' button.

items.title: Configure generation parameters
items.description: Adjust video length, aspect ratio, frame rate, and style controls. Set motion intensity, camera movement, and other creative parameters to direct your output.
items.image_prompt: Parameter configuration panel showing sliders and dropdowns for video settings: duration (5-30 seconds), aspect ratio selector (16:9, 9:16, 1:1), frame rate dropdown (24, 30, 60 fps), motion intensity slider, and style preset options. Clean, organized layout with real-time preview thumbnail.

items.title: Generate and export video
items.description: Click generate to create your video. Preview the result, make refinements if needed, then download in your preferred format and resolution for immediate use.
items.image_prompt: Results screen displaying a generated video player with playback controls, showing a preview frame of the created content. Below the player: download button with format options (MP4, WebM), resolution selector (720p, 1080p, 4K), and a 'Refine' button. Progress indicator showing generation complete.

capabilities.title: What sets Happy Horse apart
capabilities.description: Happy Horse combines advanced physics simulation with photorealistic rendering to generate video that captures real-world motion and detail. Built for creators who need production-quality output without compromise, it delivers cinematic results at speeds that match creative workflows.

items.title: Motion that follows real-world physics
items.description: Advanced physics engine simulates gravity, momentum, and collisions with precision. Objects move naturally—water flows realistically, fabric drapes correctly, and motion blur matches actual camera behavior.
items.image_prompt: A silk cloth falling and draping over a glass sphere, captured mid-motion with realistic fabric physics, natural folds, and accurate gravity, cinematic lighting, photorealistic render

items.title: Detail that matches professional cinematography
items.description: Multi-scale rendering architecture captures fine textures, complex lighting, and atmospheric effects. From skin pores to distant landscapes, every frame maintains cinematic quality with consistent color grading and depth of field.
items.image_prompt: Close-up portrait of a person with visible skin texture and pores, cinematic side lighting creating realistic shadows, accurate subsurface scattering, professional color grading, shallow depth of field

items.title: Stable motion without flickering or morphing
items.description: Temporal coherence system maintains object identity and scene structure across frames. Characters stay consistent, backgrounds remain stable, and camera movements flow smoothly without the artifacts common in other video models.
bullets: No morphing or object identity shifts
items.image_prompt: A person walking through a city street with consistent facial features and clothing throughout the motion, stable architecture in background, smooth camera tracking, no flickering or warping artifacts

items.title: Fast iteration for creative workflows
items.description: Optimized inference pipeline generates high-quality video in minutes, not hours. Fast preview modes let creators test concepts quickly, while full-resolution renders maintain quality. Designed for iterative creative processes, not batch-and-wait workflows.
bullets: Rapid preview mode for concept testing
items.image_prompt: Split-screen comparison showing a timeline interface with multiple video thumbnails generating simultaneously, progress bars at different stages, modern UI design, professional video editing software aesthetic

faq.question: What is Happy Horse by Alibaba?
faq.answer: Happy Horse is Alibaba's AI-powered video generation model that creates high-quality videos from text prompts or images. It specializes in producing realistic scenes, smooth motion, and creative content for marketing, entertainment, and creative applications.

faq.question: Is Happy Horse free to use?
faq.answer: Pricing details for Happy Horse haven't been publicly disclosed by Alibaba. The model is currently in limited access or beta phase. Contact Alibaba Cloud or check their official channels for current availability, free trial options, and commercial pricing tiers.

faq.question: What video length and resolution does Happy Horse support?
faq.answer: Happy Horse generates videos with competitive resolution and duration capabilities, though exact specifications vary by access tier. The model focuses on maintaining temporal consistency and visual quality throughout generated clips, suitable for professional content creation needs.

faq.question: How does Happy Horse compare to Sora or Runway?
faq.answer: Happy Horse competes with models like Sora and Runway in AI video generation. It emphasizes realistic motion physics and scene understanding, particularly optimized for commercial applications within Alibaba's ecosystem. Performance varies based on specific use cases and prompt complexity.

faq.question: How do I start using Happy Horse?
faq.answer: Access Happy Horse through Alibaba Cloud's platform or designated AI services portal. Create an account, submit text or image prompts describing your desired video, adjust parameters like style and duration, then generate. API integration available for developers.

bottomCta.title: Start Creating Videos with Happy Horse Today
bottomCta.description: Transform your text prompts into engaging video content in minutes. Join creators using Happy Horse for fast, reliable AI video generation.
